Services

One call handles the whole yard.

From weekly mowing to storm cleanup to a rick of seasoned oak for the fire pit, it all comes from the same trusted hands.

Mowing & Edging

Mowing, edging, and blowing on a schedule that fits your yard. Recurring service discounts available.

Seasoned Firewood

Oak and hardwood mix, cut, split, and properly seasoned. Delivery available in Mabank, stacking add-on if you want it.

Tree Trimming & Cleanup

Limb and deadwood removal, storm damage cleanup, and debris hauled off the same day.

Pricing

No games. Just a fair price for honest work.

About

Meet Joe.

Z-Mows is Joe Zmolik. After years of early mornings and long miles running delivery routes, Joe traded the highway for work closer to home and never looked back. He and his family put down roots in Mabank for the room to breathe, and caring for that kind of land is now his everyday work.

Around town you will spot the Zmoliks at the ballfields, at school events, and pitching in wherever a hand is needed. Joe grew up around helpers and entrepreneurs, and it shaped how he runs his business: show up, do it right, and charge a fair price.

No call centers, no rotating crews. When you call Z-Mows, you are talking to the guy on the mower.

Free Quote
